title: チーム総合力アップ・驚きの差し入れ

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer. Your team's synergy is really
incredible.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to express my support for you all, so I
prepared this especially for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna's special gift helps bring the team even
closer together. Now we're raring to go for the
Unity Cup!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, I've also upgraded your clubroom! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I hope you like the change. Keep it up out there.
